reason: The Cesar Chavez / Boyle Heights corridor is the most emotionally authentic location for an uninsured Latina Uber driver — it's a deeply Latino, working-class neighborhood that judges will immediately recognize. The nearest clinic is only 0.6 miles away, all top clinics speak Spanish, and AltaMed is a well-known trusted brand in the community, making the result feel credible and impressive. A tooth infection scenario creates immediate urgency without being an ER-level crisis, perfectly showcasing ClearPath's value in under 60 seconds.

top_3_clinics.name: AltaMed Medical and Dental Group: East Los Angeles, 1st Street
AltaMed Medical and Dental Group - Boyle Heights

demo_user_statement: Hi, I have a really bad toothache — I think it might be infected — and I don't have insurance. I'm near Cesar Chavez in East LA and I can't really afford to go to the ER. Is there anywhere close by I can get seen for free?
